items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数再创新高收盘后，股票期货几乎没有变化：实时更新

items.title_en: Trump says Iran agreed to not have nuclear weapons, but 'they can change their mind'
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗同意不拥有核武器，但“他们可以改变主意”
items.desc_en: The president was speaking to the New York Post's "Pod Force One" podcast in a wide-ranging interview.

items.title_en: Lloyds, Halifax and Bank of Scotland app users report outage

items.desc_zh: 周三上午，数千名劳埃德银行集团客户报告了网上银行访问问题。

items.title_en: Eli Lilly's top dealmaker says don't be surprised to see more M&A that pushes Lilly into new areas

items.title_en: Mortgage rates are easing slightly, but homebuyers are retreating
items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率略有下降，但购房者正在撤退
items.desc_en: Mortgage rates fell slightly last week, but neither current homeowners nor potential homebuyers were inspired. Demand for mortgages fell overall.
items.desc_zh: 上周抵押贷款利率略有下降，但当前的房主和潜在的购房者都没有受到鼓舞。抵押贷款需求总体下降。

items.title_en: Macy's posts strongest Q1 growth in four years, raises guidance despite consumer worries
items.title_zh: 梅西百货公布四年来最强劲的第一季度增长，尽管消费者担忧，但仍提高了指导
items.desc_en: Macy's has been in the midst of a turnaround under CEO Tony Spring, who has worked to close underperforming stores and reinvest in ones worth keeping open.
items.desc_zh: 在首席执行官托尼·斯普林 (Tony Spring) 的领导下，梅西百货 (Macy's) 一直处于扭亏为盈的状态，他致力于关闭业绩不佳的商店，并对那些值得继续营业的商店进行再投资。

items.title_en: Meta won't track its workers' clicks - but only for half an hour at a time
items.title_zh: Meta 不会跟踪其工作人员的点击 - 但一次只能跟踪半小时
items.desc_en: According to an internal memo, new controls will allow employees to pause the data collection for "up to 30 minutes at a time".
items.desc_zh: 根据一份内部备忘录，新的控制措施将允许员工“一次最多暂停 30 分钟”的数据收集。

items.desc_zh: 许多受害者是前往印度接受治疗或陪伴亲戚的南亚人。

items.title_en: U.S. proposes fresh tariffs on 60 economies over forced labor trade practices
items.title_zh: 美国提议对 60 个经济体征收新关税，原因是强迫劳动贸易行为
items.desc_en: USTR has proposed a 10% duty rate for economies that have adopted a full or partial prohibition on forced labor trade, and 12.5% for all other economies.
items.desc_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室建议对全面或部分禁止强迫劳动贸易的经济体征收 10% 的关税，对所有其他经济体征收 12.5% 的关税。

items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什在央行任命首批员工，其中包括《Project 2025》作者
items.desc_en: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."
items.desc_zh: 新任美联储主席已经任命了他的第一批人选。其中一位在保守派政策蓝图“2025 年计划”中写下了美联储的章节。

items.desc_zh: 该公司在 2 月份给出了令人失望的指导意见，低于分析师的预期，导致预期下调。

items.title_zh: 因埃博拉疫情，市长取消了刚果民主共和国与智利在西班牙的友谊赛
items.desc_en: DR Congo's international friendly against Chile in Spain next week is cancelled after authorities raise health concerns over the Ebola outbreak in the African nation.
items.desc_zh: 在当局对非洲国家埃博拉疫情提出健康担忧后，刚果民主共和国下周在西班牙对阵智利的国际友谊赛被取消。

items.title_en: Celebration, shock and scepticism follow Colombia’s presidential election - Al Jazeera

items.desc_en: Celebration, shock and scepticism follow Colombia’s presidential election  Al JazeeraColombian presidency goes to runoff election that could redefine relations with the US  CNNPro-Trump presidential c
items.desc_zh: 哥伦比亚总统选举结束后，庆祝、震惊和怀疑接踵而至 半岛电视台 哥伦比亚总统进入决选，这可能会重新定义与美国的关系

items.title_en: Microsoft says new quantum chip 1,000 times more reliable than predecessor
items.title_zh: 微软称新量子芯片比前代芯片可靠 1000 倍
items.desc_en: The tech giant predicts it will have a quantum computer that can solve commercially useful problems by the end of the decade.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头预测，到本世纪末，它将拥有一台可以解决商业有用问题的量子计算机。

items.title_en: Two arrested after four migrant farm workers killed in Italy minivan fire
items.title_zh: 意大利小型货车火灾中四名农民工丧生，两人被捕
items.desc_en: CCTV images showed two people blocking the van's doors from the outside and throwing liquid inside to start a fire.
items.desc_zh: 闭路电视图像显示，两人从外面堵住货车车门，并向车内扔液体引发火灾。

items.title_en: Mysteriously missing New Jersey congressman receives Trump endorsement
items.title_zh: 神秘失踪的新泽西州国会议员获得特朗普支持
items.desc_en: Republican Congressman Tom Kean Jr has not been seen for months but is expected to win Tuesday's election.
items.desc_zh: 共和党国会议员小汤姆·基恩已经几个月没有露面，但预计将赢得周二的选举。

items.title_en: Israel strikes southern Lebanon but partial truce with Hezbollah appears to hold
items.title_zh: 以色列袭击黎巴嫩南部，但与真主党的部分休战似乎仍然有效
items.desc_en: Israel continues its campaign in the south, though has not struck Beirut after a deal announced by the US.
items.desc_zh: 以色列继续在南部发动攻势，但在美国宣布达成协议后并未袭击贝鲁特。

items.title_en: Canada formally requests renewal of North American free trade pact
items.title_zh: 加拿大正式请求续签北美自由贸易协定
items.desc_en: In a letter to his North American counterparts, US-Canada Trade Minister Dominic LeBlanc said the three countries should renew the USMCA trade deal.
items.desc_zh: 美加贸易部长多米尼克·勒布朗在致北美同行的信中表示，这三个国家应续签《美加墨加协定》(USMCA) 贸易协议。

items.title_en: British couple lose Iran jail sentence appeal, family says
items.title_zh: 家人称英国夫妇伊朗判刑上诉败诉
items.desc_en: Lindsay and Craig Foreman were arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey.
items.desc_zh: Lindsay 和 Craig Foreman 于 2025 年 1 月在一次全球摩托车旅行中被捕。

items.desc_zh: 梅丽莎·雷因·莱弗利接受了警告，而对她的殴打指控也被撤回。
